message:
🐛 Fix Workloads dashboard not showing demo data in demo mode (#478)

The WorkloadDeployment card was showing "No workloads found" in demo mode
because:

1. `availableClusters` was derived from API clusters (empty in demo mode)
2. `localClusterFilter` persisted in localStorage could have old cluster
   names that don't match demo data cluster names
3. This caused all demo workloads to be filtered out

Fix:
- In demo mode, derive `availableClusters` from DEMO_WORKLOADS' target
  clusters instead of from the API
- Validate the localStorage cluster filter against available clusters
  before applying it, preventing stale filters from hiding all data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
